title: Circuit switching, packet switching
summary: 9618 A Level — circuit vs packet switching, routing, and internet data transmission.
learningObjectives: Describe advantages of packet switching for internet.

simpleExplanation.title: Two switching methods
simpleExplanation.summary: Circuit switching dedicates a path for the whole call. Packet switching splits data into routed packets sharing links.
steps: Packet: data split with headers — internet model.

sections.content: **Switching** (14.2) explains **why the internet uses packets**. List **two advantages** of packet over circuit switching.
